title: International Perspectives on Health and Nursing 健康和护理的国际化视角
description: The course “International Perspectives on Health and Nursing” will be given totally in English. It is a 6-week course with one topic in each week. Topics covered by this course include global health challenges, healthcare systems in different countries, nursing specialties and roles in different healthcare system, nursing education programs in various countries, nursing research agencies and status in different countries, and technologies that have changed nursing practice significantly.
